in walking. 0 = Independent - No help or oversight, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided, 2 = Limited Assistance - Resident highly involved in walking; received physical help in guided maneuvering of limbs or other nonweight bearing assistance, 3 = Extensive Assistance - Resident received weight bearing assistance while walking, "-" = Unknown
547 T2D T2D_SUPORT_WALK (T2D) Walking Support Provided CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - walking
